text:
エネルギータンク、転送！
衝撃で爆発させれば、敵さんを
巻き込んで攻撃できますよー！

ただ、近くにいる味方も
巻き込んじゃう恐れがあります！
巻き込み確認、ご注意をー！

Teleporting energy tanks! If you bombard
them with your attacks, they will explode
and take the enemies down with it!

Just be careful, because any allies near the
energy tanks could get caught in the explosion!
